query: SAG-AFTRA Sean Astin president first policy initiatives priorities 2025

mako.raw:
{"query":"SAG-AFTRA Sean Astin president first policy initiatives priorities 2025","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1126,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://deadline.com/2025/07/sean-astin-running-for-sag-aftra-president-2025-1236455606/","title":"Sean Astin To Run For SAG-AFTRA President","content":"The Lord of the Rings actor Sean Astin is seeking to replace SAG-AFTRA President Fran Drescher in the upcoming union election.
Also on his ticket are Michelle Hurd for secretary-treasurer, Joely Fisher for president of the Los Angeles Local Board, Lisa Ann Walter for first vice president of the Local Board, and David Jolliffe to return for second vice president.
If elected, Astin would follow in the footsteps of his mother Patty Duke, the Valley of the Dolls and The Miracle Worker actress who became the second woman to ever run the then-Screen Actors Guild in 1985.
She held the position for three years.
Astin has previously served on five separate SAG-AFTRA negotiating committees, including the most recent contract won after a historically long, 118-day strike in 2023.
Current SAG-AFTRA President Drescher could not be reached for comment on whether she plans to seek another term.
Deadline understands that SAG-AFTRA New England Local board member Chuck Slavin has also submitted a bid for president.
This will be the first contract negotiation cycle after the 2023 strike, regarding an industry that has been hit hard by a global production contraction that has resulted in far less work.
There are still some concerns the union is seeking to address, primarily regarding technological advances in artificial intelligence over the past three years.
Election ballots will be collected from August 13 to September 12.
The Hollywood Reporter was first to report the news of Astin’s bid.
Get our Breaking News Alerts and Keep your inbox happy."}]}

{"query":"SAG-AFTRA Sean Astin president first policy initiatives priorities 2025","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NyS9CcggglM","title":"New SAG-AFTRA President Sean Astin On His Day-One Priorities (Part 1)","content":"New SAG-AFTRA President Sean Astin On His Day-One Priorities (Part 1)

Link to Part 2: https://youtu.be/GVahH7Cgi-4

Sean Astin has spent most of his life in front of the camera starring in beloved films like The Goonies, Rudy, and The Lord of the Rings — and behind the scenes as a committed advocate for SAG-AFTRA and its members. Now he’s leading our union as its newly elected president. In Part 1 of this 2-part conversation with SAG-AFTRA National Executive Director and Chief Negotiator, Duncan Crabtree-Ireland, Sean talks about what this moment means to him, how his mother Patty Duke’s presidency shaped him, and why he sees this role as “identity shaping.” He also shares his vision for the next chapter of the union, including a deep focus on health and pension plans, A.I., and modernizing the member experience. *The views expressed by guests are their own and do not necessarily reflect the views of their organization or SAG-AFTRA. Any mention of products or services does not imply endorsement.

About SAG-AFTRA:
Welcome to the official SAG-AFTRA YouTube channel. On this channel, you’ll find a variety of informational, entertaining, and educational content, including interviews, industry panel discussions, celebrity events, actor to actor interviews, SAG Awards red carpet footage, award show bts, and more. SAG-AFTRA members are the faces and voices that entertain and inform America and the world. With national offices in Los Angeles and New York, and local offices nationwide, SAG-AFTRA members work together to secure the strongest protections for media artists into the 21st century and beyond.

#SAGAFTRA

Video by Sean Astin on August 26, 2025.","score":0.74961954,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.latimes.com/entertainment-arts/business/story/2025-09-12/sag-aftra-names-next-national-president","title":"'Lord of the Rings' star Sean Astin elected SAG-AFTRA president - Los Angeles Times","content":"# ‘Lord of the Rings’ star Sean Astin elected SAG-AFTRA president. Sean Astin from the film “Little Lorraine,” photographed in the Los Angeles Times Studios at RBC House, during the Toronto International Film Festival. Screen Actors Guild-American Federation of Television and Radio Artists on Friday elected “The Lord of the Rings” actor Sean Astin to be its national president as one of Hollywood’s most powerful labor unions faces new challenges in a changing film and TV industry. The 54-year-old actor will become leader of the 160,000-person performers union as it prepares to enter negotiations next year for a new contract with the major studios at a time when the entertainment industry faces consolidation, productions moving overseas and artificial intelligence. Sean Astin, famous for his roles in ‘The Lord of the Rings’ and ‘Rudy,’ is squaring off Chuck Slavin, a performer in independent movies. Astin told The Times in an interview earlier this month that he is hopeful about securing a fair deal with the studios.","score":0.6977124,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://deadline.com/2025/07/sean-astin-running-for-sag-aftra-president-2025-1236455606","title":"Sean Astin To Run For SAG-AFTRA President","content":"The Lord of the Rings actor Sean Astin is seeking to replace SAG-AFTRA President Fran Drescher in the upcoming union election.","score":0.5803764,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.sagaftra.org/sag-aftra-members-elect-sean-astin-president-and-michelle-hurd-secretary-treasurer","title":"SAG-AFTRA Members Elect Sean Astin President and ...","content":"President Sean Astin said, “Now is a time for optimism and creativity. confidence, progress and fierce advocacy. we advance the initiatives and","score":0.52524763,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":0.86,"request_id":"ffdae2f6-a661-4fda-8d47-2811ca569af1"}
